data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: RBI curbs loans extended to brokers in blow to trading volumes
data.description: RBI tightens loan rules for brokers, aiming to reduce speculative trading and potentially impact market volumes in India.

data.author: Enda Curran, Ilena Peng, Bloomberg
data.title: America’s vanishing cattle herd drives 15% price hikes for beef
data.description: “It actually feels extremely fragile. So even though cattle are worth more than they have ever been, it costs a lot more to stay in business.”
data.content: While US inflation has cooled from its pandemic-era peak, prices at grocery store meat counters are skyrocketing with no relief in sight.Beef costs have risen faster than most other items in the cons… [+6254 chars]
